Director, QA Engineering

We are seeking an experienced Director of QA Engineering to lead our global quality assurance

organization. This executive-level role requires deep expertise in test automation, CI/CD integration,

and team leadership. You will oversee multiple QA teams across different products, set strategic

quality standards, drive organizational excellence, and collaborate with C-level leadership on quality

metrics and risk assessment. This position reports directly to the VP of Engineering.

About the Company

Nimbus QA Systems is a leading provider of enterprise-grade test automation and quality assurance
solutions. We empower engineering teams across Fortune 500 companies to scale their QA

operations while maintaining the highest standards of software quality. Our platform combines AI-
driven testing insights with robust automation frameworks to reduce release cycles and accelerate

time-to-market.

What You'll Own

1. Lead and mentor a team of 15-25 QA engineers, quality architects, and automation specialists

across multiple geographic locations; establish performance goals and conduct annual reviews

2. Develop and execute multi-year QA strategy aligned with company roadmap, including test

automation frameworks, CI/CD pipeline architecture, and quality metrics that reduce defect

escape rates

3. Own quality KPIs including test coverage, defect density, mean time to resolution (MTTR), and

customer-reported bugs; present quarterly insights to executive leadership

4. Define and govern test automation standards using Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, and

Python; establish best practices and architectural patterns across teams

5. Architect and oversee CI test pipelines using industry-standard platforms (Jenkins, GitHub

Actions, GitLab CI); optimize build times and ensure test reliability at scale

6. Drive organizational initiatives such as shift-left testing, API-first test design using Postman, and

cross-team automation training programs

7. Partner with Product, Engineering, and DevOps leadership to assess quality risks for major

releases; make go/no-go decisions for production deployments

at Nimbus QA Systems — Intelligent Testing, Fearless DeploymentSan Francisco, CA (Remote-First) • Full-Time • $280,000 - $420,000 USD 8. Budget and resource planning for QA department including tools, infrastructure, and hiring;

evaluate new testing technologies and justify ROI

9. Champion a quality-first culture across the engineering organization; establish mentorship

programs and career development paths for individual contributors and engineering managers

Perks & Benefits

Competitive equity package with stock options and 401(k) matching
Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision coverage with zero-

premium options
Unlimited paid time off with a minimum of 4 weeks encouraged annually

 Professional development budget of $10,000 per year for conferences, certifications, and

training

Fully remote-first work model with optional access to San Francisco headquarters

Parental leave (16 weeks paid) and fertility benefits

Mental health support including therapy stipend and meditation app subscriptions

Home office setup stipend ($2,500) and annual tech refresh budget

Next Steps

Apply directly through our careers portal at careers.nimbusqa.com/director-qa-engineering or email

your resume and cover letter to hiring@nimbusqa.com. Please include examples of QA

organizational initiatives you've led and metrics demonstrating quality improvements. Hiring manager

interviews will include technical depth assessment and leadership case studies. We conduct

background checks and reference verification for all offers.
